notes: 8-GPU datacenter server (Ampere sm_80), ~320 GB aggregate GPU memory — the multi-GPU serving / frontier-model readiness lane where single-box memory ceilings stop binding. The eight Ampere GPUs are the spec'd hardware; host CPU/RAM are the standard reference config (verify at onboarding). Benchmark RUNS attach under the private 'dgx' machine id (kept off the public export); this 'a100' record is the public-facing rollup (no operator identity).
